changes: tcg pocket — key modal + card-cycle polish

key — moved from an inline dropdown to a modal opened by a small "key" button (the page already has enough dropdowns). lowercase names / uppercase codes, dropped fairy (no icon, not in pocket yet), and removed the prize-points section
card modal — the hero image now reserves its box from the standard card aspect-ratio, so the stats/attacks below no longer jump when the next card's art loads mid-cycle
the scroll region also resets to the top on every prev/next
energy icons — load eagerly instead of lazily, so the type / weakness / attack-cost symbols paint immediately (they were sometimes blank while arrow-cycling)
removed the per-card prize-points chip — the scraper mislabels "Pokémon Tool" cards as card_type "pokemon", so it wrongly surfaced on tools
tcg pocket — card detail + browse polish
accessory loading fixes
card modal — card number now reads N/total (e.g. 36/286) instead of #36
rarity moved out of the subheading down into the attributes row as its letter code (RR/SAR/…, decoded by the new key)
added a per-card KO prize-points chip (regular = 1, ex = 2, mega = 3)
cards page key — a collapsible reference that decodes the rarity letter codes → names, names each energy type (with its icon), and lays out the prize-point rules (first to 3 wins)

card search — a per-page name search distinct from the global header search, debounced 220ms. typing used to fire an image request per intermediate match (~150 thumb requests for "raichu" vs 14 real matches), clogging the cdn + connection pool so the actual results loaded last
now only the settled query filters
alt-print "other prints" strip — tapping the print that's already showing is now a no-op (it used to toggle back to the grid card)
accessories — thumbnails + the modal hero now render through the shared so there's a spinner while they load
the modal hero reserves its box from the item's aspect-ratio so the "how to unlock" text no longer jumps down when the image finishes loading
about page — "curious what's new?" (dropped "changed" sitting next to "changelog")

spotlight cry audio — fixed the silent cry on macOS safari: it was hitting the long-standing webkit bug where AudioContext.createMediaElementSource() outputs silence (fine on iphone/ipad, mute on mac). now branches by platform — iOS/ipados keeps ogg through a Web Audio gain node (element.volume is a no-op there, so it's the only way to attenuate), desktop plays showdown mp3 straight through a plain <audio> element (no Web Audio → no CORS, no silence bug), volume via element.volume

tcg pocket — "other prints" (echoes): a card modal now shows a strip of every functionally-identical print — same attacks/hp/type/ability/weakness/retreat, differing only in artwork — tap a thumb to swap the art in place. grouped by a function signature so the two distinct Charizard ex (slash/crimson-storm vs stoke/steam-artillery) stay separate
cross-set reprints included. 2234 cards across 800 print groups
each thumb shows its rarity
mobile header — the wordmark shrinks to just the accent "XR" on phones (full "project" hidden < 640px

whole mark hidden < 360px where the longest burger label would collide). tcgp burger labels drop the middot separator → "tcgp cards" / "tcgp accessories". opening the search still hides the burger label + wordmark to make room

changelog generator — fixed over-splitting: rejoin hard-wrapped continuation lines, strip markdown "- "/"* " bullet markers and keep those whole (a ";" inside an explicit bullet is prose, not a boundary), only split plain prose lines on ";". removes the spurious mid-sentence bullet fragments in older entries (157 → 145 bullets)
naming — internal package + lockfile names pokedex-* → project-xr-* to match the rebrand (invisible identifiers
deploy uses npm install so no lockfile-strictness break)

project XR rebrand + repo→project-xr migration — site retitled to "project XR" across tab title, header wordmark, about page, pwa manifests, readme (github handle + shockwavexr.github.io domain left intact)
vite base → /project-xr/, 404 spa fallback rewritten, and /news is now the canonical home with the bare root redirecting there
header restructure — centered non-interactive "project XR" wordmark (soft header-bg fade over the sprite strip)
burger now names the current section in-bubble (news, pokedex, tcgp · cards…)
header search collapses to a magnifier that expands on tap, matching the cog
redundant in-page h1 titles dropped across pages now that the section lives in the burger
dev builds get a 🚧 tab-title marker
wordmark XR is italic+accent in every theme
tcg pocket — imported set B3b (106 cards) + new promo-b cards (3406 → 3520)
detail-modal full image falls back png → webp for B3a/B3b whose 670px png 403s on the cdn
accessories catalog refreshed (554 → 577) + obtain-method run-on strings cleaned ("obtain from a mission Mission:" → "complete the mission:", stray "Mission: To be determined" tails dropped)
spotlight — cry button shows a live playing indicator (accent fill + pulse ring + animated sound-waves) driven by the audio element's play/ended events, returning to rest when the cry finishes
tcg pocket — imported paradox drive (b3a) + promo sets
fixed promo set-code mismatch in the scraper (limitless P-A/P-B vs flibustier PROMO-A/B) + metadata-only 404 fallback
